title: Snotkop entertains ladies at Gapp Cafe
description: GEORGE NEWS - Members of the Garden Route...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Members of the Garden Route Mall Ladies Club enjoyed a lovely late afternoon brunch at Gapp Cafe on Friday 22 November with none other than the Afrikaans singer Snotkop as guest artist.


> A total of 120 ladies were treated to a delicious breakfast and goodie bags from tenants, exhibitors, and external brands.


"A total of more than 40 brands / companies partnered with us to make this event a total success.

"There were 72 prize giveaways to guests, an absolute treat for the club members," says the mall's marketing manager, Tumi Masango.

The grand total sponsorship value for the event was R360 000.

"What a great celebration with Snotkop and a well-rounded conclusion to the year. We would like to thank our tenants, exhibitors, and external brands for their generous contributions towards the success of the event," says Masango.

The next Ladies Club event will be in May 2025.

The singer had the ladies on their feet and dancing.

A lovely time was had by all.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
